text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and I have come to the shopping
district to buy some daily necessities when we
spot a throng of people ahead of us.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It appears something is happening up ahead.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah, a raffle.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello there. Are you two heading home?
Before you do, you wouldn't happen to have a
raffle ticket on you, would you?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A raffle ticket? As a matter of fact, I do. I
received one earlier.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Great! Come on over, then!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I wouldn't want the ticket go to waste,
but...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When I was a child, I once destroyed a raffle
machine in a fit of rage because I couldn't accept
the results.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I was forbidden from entering any
more local raffles.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm still unaccustomed to them, I'm... quite
nervous about how I'll react!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Please, won't you turn the lever with me?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You have my thanks. Now, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and I give the raffle machine a
gentle spin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The grand prize!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HNGH! ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: How fortuitous.
choice_data_list:
Oh, come on! You gotta get more excited than
that!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I will not! There's no greater mark of immaturity
than being swept up in emotion.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I must remain composed at all times!
choice_data_list: You don't have to suppress your joy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that as long as she doesn't go running
around wildly or something, it's fine to show as
much happiness as she wants.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I-is that so? So it's all right for me to let loose this
delight I'm feeling?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Let's!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HURRAAAY!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'd like for you to use this coupon.
choice_data_list: Huh? But you won it with your raffle ticket...
Huh? But you won it with your raffle ticket...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've been observing you as you walk and noticed
that your movements are a bit rigid, especially in
the neck, shoulders, and lower back.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I suspect you're suffering from stiff muscles, in
which case I recommend going to a hot spring to
recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's right. My shoulders and back do feel stiff, but when I point out that she must be tired as well...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense. I'm the picture of health. Thanks to
your guidance, nary a trace of fatigue lingers
within my body.
choice_data_list: Sure, but you could still definitely use a break.
Sure, but you could still definitely use a break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd even argue it's especially important for
someone like Yaeno Muteki, who keeps herself to
such militantly high standards, to take breaks.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... training at a hot spring might be a
refreshing change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, the coupon's for two, so how about
this?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Once our schedule opens up, why don't we both
go together?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Then it's decided. I shall leave the coupon in your
care.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. I can hardly wait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Yaeno Muteki and I make a fun plan to
look forward to!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Th-this carrot hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Rice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: We need rice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've had this hamburger steak before back at
home. Someone gave one to my family as a
year-end gift.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The succulent demi-glace sauce goes
exceptionally well with rice! We refilled our bowls
so quickly, we ran out of rice before we knew it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It won't suffice to bring back this deluxe carrot
hamburger steak on its own.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Let's buy some rice and hurry back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Yaeno Muteki's request, we go buy a bag of
rice before heading home.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Munch, munch, munch.
choice_data_list: I can't stop eating! This is so good!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it wonderful? What can you call this
combination of deluxe carrot hamburger steak
and rice if not pure bliss?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Long live demi-glace sauce!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Yaeno Muteki, I get the chance to
delight in the ultimate pairing of deluxe carrot
hamburger steak and rice!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What?! That's so many!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
By no means can we finish all these with just the
two of us.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Forgive me for pressing such a silly question upon
you, but...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm unfamiliar with the details of how
friendships work, there's something I'd like to
confirm with you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Would it be considered rude to offer my
classmates food made with these carrots?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Really? Then I think I'll prepare some dishes for
Chiyono O and Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Mmm! That was delicious!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the home-cooked carrot feast, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Everything was delectable. I particularly liked the
refreshing taste of the carrot rice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...!
I... I'm glad you both enjoyed the meal.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Carrots are highly nutritious, so when I came into
possession of a wealth of carrots, I immediately
thought of you two.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I know it was presumptuous, but I hope you'll
forgive me for showing up suddenly with so many.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... You have nothing to apologize for,
Yaeno. Thank you so much for this. Hehehe. I'm
so glad you think so dearly of us.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Same! That's precisely what they mean when they
say, "Show humanity to your enemy and a carrot
to your rival!"

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Hmm? Why do I feel like I've heard something
similar before?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Interesting proverb aside, Yaeno Muteki seems
more than pleased that the two enjoyed the
carrot dishes she made.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hmm, a single carrot...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll pickle this. Pickles are great for
replenishing one's sodium levels, and are perfect
for snacking on during breaks between training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
They make a good lunch served with rice balls as
well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: So it is, if I do say so myself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
One look at this carrot's luster was enough to
convince me to pickle it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to try some once it's ready? I'll
bring it to our next training session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Yaeno Muteki and I have the
pickled carrot. It's delightful, with just the right
amount of salt!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I see. This must have been a test.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Were you not testing to see if I would be
able to calmly accept even the bitterest of raffle
outcomes?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
What?! Why would I even consider doing such a
thing?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You needn't try to hide the truth. I know I
am merely reaping what I sowed long, long ago.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you how capable I am of enduring this
humiliating outcome with full composure!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Tissues... What more perfect and universally
utilitarian a prize could one ask for?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Heh... Behold! I was able to transform a single raffle ticket into this much paper!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If that isn't the definition of good fortune, then
what is? Not only that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say Yaeno Muteki is perfectly
composed, but she manages to stay reasonably
calm, showing only a hint of disappointment.
